coverage_map.q1: Define what a probabilistic system is in plain, everyday terms.

coverage_map.q5: Explain what probability, randomness, and uncertainty mean in the context of computational systems — at a beginner level.
coverage_map.q6: Recognise everyday situations in which a probabilistic approach is more appropriate than a deterministic one.
